issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly handle error scenarios such as missing columns, invalid data types, or parsing failures.

scenarios.name: Monthly reimbursable expense report from CSV
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses pandas.read_csv plus the documented CATEGORY_RULES keyword map (airline/hotel/uber for Travel etc.), groupby summary, and an openpyxl ExcelWriter producing Summary / By Category / All Expenses sheets; baseline produces a generic pandas summary but lacks the multi-sheet output and rule-based auto-categorization.

scenarios.name: Compile annual business expenses for tax filing
scenarios.rationale: Treatment groups expenses to align with IRS Schedule C categories noted in the skill (meals at 50%, travel, supplies), flags duplicates by same vendor+amount+date, and emits Excel + markdown summaries via the documented helpers; baseline totals expenses but does not split by Schedule C lines or flag duplicates.
